series_metadata.series_title: Sample Sheets/ Unsecured Sample Forms/Evidence Env
series_metadata.series_description: File contains 3 documents. The first is the internally utilized document, which describes what item was removed from a retail outlet, the manufacturer, and the location of the facility. The second document is one, which is completed by our field inspectors which communicates to the laboratory personnel that a sample was not secured for analysis purposes. The third contains correspondence, sample and related material. Samples are taken for analysis from stuffing in bedding and stuffed toys. ORC 3713 (combined with 839-15)

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: After decision/analysis has been made, retain 2 year then destroy., Paper: Recycle
